grid.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
grid.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)] gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-700 active:scale-95 transition-all duration-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-primary active:scale-95 transition-all duration-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors duration-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 transition-colors duration-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden
cards.glass: bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-lg rounded-xl
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 hover:ring-2 hover:ring-primary/10 transition-all duration-200

inputs.base: w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 bg-white dark:bg-slate-950 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200

sidebar.container: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-slate-900 text-white z-50 transition-transform duration-300
sidebar.link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200 mb-1
sidebar.link_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 bg-primary text-white rounded-lg font-medium shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 mb-1

header.container: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full border-b border-slate-200/50 dark:border-slate-800/50 bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against background.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for modern icons to replace FontAwesome/Metronic icons where possible.
Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new colors and font families.
Add the 'Manrope' font to 'public/index.html' via Google Fonts.
Redesign the 'LoginComponent.js' using the new 'Glassmorphism' style with the provided login background.
Create a new 'DashboardLayout' component that uses the 'Sidebar' and 'Header' styles defined above.
Refactor 'DashboardNew/user-interface/DashboardNewComponent.js' to use the 'Bento Grid' layout.
For tables (PrimeReact), override the default styles to remove heavy borders and add more padding.
Ensure all new components use functional components with hooks.
Use 'clsx' or 'tailwind-merge' for conditional class application.
When modifying existing files, verify that imports are correct and do not break the build.
For the Map view (Leaflet), try to apply a custom tile layer if possible, or at least clean up the controls.
Implement 'Dark Mode' support using Tailwind's 'dark:' classes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified.
Use 'Inter' for body text and 'Manrope' for headings.
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'data-testid'.
Avoid using 'style' prop for CSS; use Tailwind classes.
Keep the UI clean and avoid clutter. Use whitespace generously.
Ensure the application is responsive and works well on mobile devices.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications instead of 'react-toastify' or others if applicable.
